name: agent-sdlc
description: Agent SDLC — a full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents, from idea to a reviewed PR. This repo is its own single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: agent-sdlc
plugins.description: Full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents: idea -> acceptance criteria -> architecture -> techstack -> atomic task plan -> readiness gate -> test-first subagent-driven build -> reviewed PR. Run the whole chain or invoke any stage standalone, resolving its input from any source (prompt, doc, Linear, repo) without weakening the gate or traceability. Plus four standalone skills: three documentation skills (the front-door README, the repo essentials — install, usage, contributing, community-health files — and full technical internals under a coverage contract) and repo-setup (machinery and marked skeletons: the agent-instruction split, CI/templates/CODEOWNERS scaffolding, opt-in pipeline setup).
